'''竏單-dh-s-l''' ('''kadadhseloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ancestor|ancestor]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-dh-s-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ancestor|ancestor]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏單-dh-s-l
|-
! Lemma
| kadadhseloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidadhseloko|thidadhseloko]] || [[word:jidadhseloko|jidadhseloko]] || [[word:shidadhseloko|shidadhseloko]] || [[word:kidadhseloko|kidadhseloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudadhseloko|thuthudadhseloko]] || [[word:jujudadhseloko|jujudadhseloko]] || [[word:shushudadhseloko|shushudadhseloko]] || [[word:kukudadhseloko|kukudadhseloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudadhseloko|thudadhseloko]] || [[word:judadhseloko|judadhseloko]] || [[word:shudadhseloko|shudadhseloko]] || [[word:kudadhseloko|kudadhseloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudadhseloko|thudadhseloko]] || [[word:judadhseloko|judadhseloko]] || [[word:shudadhseloko|shudadhseloko]] || [[word:kudadhseloko|kudadhseloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedadhseloko|thedadhseloko]] || [[word:jedadhseloko|jedadhseloko]] || [[word:shedadhseloko|shedadhseloko]] || [[word:kedadhseloko|kedadhseloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodadhseloko|thothodadhseloko]] || [[word:jojodadhseloko|jojodadhseloko]] || [[word:shoshodadhseloko|shoshodadhseloko]] || [[word:kokodadhseloko|kokodadhseloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodadhseloko|thodadhseloko]] || [[word:jodadhseloko|jodadhseloko]] || [[word:shodadhseloko|shodadhseloko]] || [[word:kodadhseloko|kodadhseloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodadhseloko|thodadhseloko]] || [[word:jodadhseloko|jodadhseloko]] || [[word:shodadhseloko|shodadhseloko]] || [[word:kodadhseloko|kodadhseloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦdadhseloko|thﾃｦdadhseloko]] || [[word:jﾃｦdadhseloko|jﾃｦdadhseloko]] || [[word:shﾃｦdadhseloko|shﾃｦdadhseloko]] || [[word:kﾃｦdadhseloko|kﾃｦdadhseloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadadhseloko|thathadadhseloko]] || [[word:jajadadhseloko|jajadadhseloko]] || [[word:shashadadhseloko|shashadadhseloko]] || [[word:kakadadhseloko|kakadadhseloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadadhseloko|thadadhseloko]] || [[word:jadadhseloko|jadadhseloko]] || [[word:shadadhseloko|shadadhseloko]] || [[word:kadadhseloko|kadadhseloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadadhseloko|thadadhseloko]] || [[word:jadadhseloko|jadadhseloko]] || [[word:shadadhseloko|shadadhseloko]] || [[word:kadadhseloko|kadadhseloko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
